title: Upload files via APIv2
excerpt: Is it possible to upload documents using the APIv2? Could not find this information in the documentation.

posts.author: NguyenLy (Nguyen Ly)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to upload documents using the APIv2? Could not find this information in the documentation.

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Howdy @NguyenLy

We’ve since added the ability to upload files to both updates and file columns using the API!

You can find the documentation here - https://monday.com/developers/v2#mutations-section-files
